summary: The diff implements all five requirements. REQ-1 is addressed in bleNus.ts with a pipe-split parser returning numeric battery/latency/value fields. REQ-2 is addressed in BluetoothContext.tsx importing and invoking parseEsp32PipeFormat and storing results in state. REQ-3 is addressed in BatteryIndicator.tsx consuming batteryPercentage from context with progress bar and color-coded icon. REQ-4 is addressed via ActuationLatencyCard.tsx referenced in Dashboard.tsx and file summaries as reading from context directly. REQ-5 is addressed via BlinkRateChart.tsx accepting lightLevelData prop and Dashboard.tsx wiring setOnLightLevelChange to append timestamped data points.
